title: Command Catalog
description: All discovered commands with classification status.

command.description: The command verbatim as found in source

source.description: Where the command was found (e.g., Makefile:test, README.md)

scope.description: Whether the command applies to the whole repo or a specific module

modules.description: Which modules this command applies to (empty = all)

block_reason.description: Why this command is BLOCKED (only for status=BLOCKED)
